title: Monkey Duck quack reduces attack profile for battle

card.rawText: During battle, your opponent may "Quack" out loud 3 times. If they do, reduce this card's base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier by -1 for this battle.

effect.value: During battle, your opponent may "Quack" out loud 3 times. If they do, reduce this card's base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier by -1 for this battle.

plan.title: Monkey Duck quack reduces attack profile for battle
